reason: Documentation-only sweep after the v0.20.0 feature batch: the touched files under UI/** are README.md and LLM.md (folder notes), not code or XAML. They now describe the already-shipped chip-based hotkey pickers, the second 'open at orb' hotkey, tile emoji/colour and the DialogShell/ToastHost family. No pixel of the application changed, so there is nothing for a mockup set to compare against.
